docFactsUsed: AREA-006: IContentQueryDataContainer.ContentItemRequiredMemberRoleNames: IReadOnlyCollection<string>. Lazy loading: role data only fetched when at least one item has ContentItemIsSecured=true.
AREA-009: HasAccess(this IContentItemFieldsSource, ClaimsPrincipal) — public extension method returning bool. Three-tier: Allowed/NotAuthenticated/Forbidden.
AREA-009: Three-tier access check: Allowed (200), NotAuthenticated (401), Forbidden (403).
AREA-006: ContentItemRolesResultProcessor post-processes query results. For unsecured items, ContentItemRequiredMemberRoleNames returns empty collection.
notes: Attempt 2 rewrite addressing all 3 style reviewer rejections and 1 accuracy reviewer note from attempt 1. Changes: (1) INV-structure-001: Added '## Next steps' section at end of page with three links -- member roles page, ContentAccessSettings reference, and content item query API. (2) INV-formatting-016: Replaced all 4 em dashes (—) with double hyphens (--) on lines 263, 264, 265, and 357. (3) INV-codesamples-004: Changed imperative code comments '// Project the secured state' and '// Project the required member role names' to third-person '// Projects the secured state' and '// Projects the required member role names' on lines 382 and 385. (4) Accuracy note: Clarified line 365 from 'the collection is empty' to 'the collection is empty or null' for public/authenticated-only items, since unsecured items may return null rather than an empty collection. All content outside the targeted lines is preserved unchanged from attempt 1.
